abilities.name: intimidate
abilities.description: Lowers opponents' Attack one stage upon entering battle.

effectChanges.description: Does not take effect if acquired after entering battle.

abilities.name: anger-point
abilities.description: Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.

abilities.name: sheer-force
abilities.description: Strengthens moves with extra effects to 1.3× their power, but prevents their extra effects.
